data.body:
Russia opened a “Ten Centuries of Polish Russophobia” exhibit at the Katyn memorial, where the Soviet secret police executed thousands of Polish POWs in 1940. 

Polish flags were removed in 2022; Stalin busts were added to the nearby Mednoye mass grave site in 2023
